channel.title: AI Agents on RepoIntel 开源情报局
channel.description: Recent content in AI Agents on RepoIntel 开源情报局

item.title: [Score: 75.8] TryCaspian/caspian-sdk
item.description: Caspian将Slack、Discord、Telegram等20+消息通道抽象为单一on_message处理器，大幅减少AI Agent的通道适配胶水代码，但核心SDK客户端与网关服务实现未在源码中审阅，稳定性待验证。

item.title: [Score: 80.4] codejunkie99/meridian-company-os
item.description: 一个本地优先、模拟驱动的公司操作系统，将人与AI代理的任务、审批、财务和实时心跳整合到单一控制台。

item.title: [Score: 79.45] oomol-lab/open-connector
item.description: 开源SaaS认证网关，通过SDK/CLI/MCP等方式为AI代理提供1000+提供商的统一Action访问，并支持本地和Cloudflare部署。

item.title: [Score: 79.65] Sahir619/fable-method
item.description: The Fable Workflow distills Claude Fable 5’s problem-solving method into three skills—think, act, prove—backed by an adversarial eval with 159 agent runs and documented failures, targeting developers who need to catch AI agent dishonesty and traps.
